author: @TylerMcCrackerJacker

text:
King Harkinian: Zelda... (beeping sounds) Duke Onkled is under attack by the evil forces of Ganon. (gun clicks) (beeping sounds) I'm going to Gamelon to aid him.
Zelda as King Harkinian: But father, what if something happens to you?
King Harkinian: (lips and eyebrows growing) I'll take the Tri-Force of Courage to protect me. (explosion) (photo heads) If you don't hear from me in a month, send Link.
Zelda: (her hair has snakes, 3 mouths) Impa!
Impa as King Harkinian: Don't worry, Zelda. The Tri-Force of Wisdom... (shows black and white footage of dancing couples) promises the King will safely return.
King Harkinian (Link): Enough! (Oh, boy!) My ship sails... (I'm so hungry...) in the morning. I wonder... (I could eat an Octorock!) what's for dinner? (both gets errors)
Mysterious Girl in Background: Mardred me! Mardred, Mardred, Mardred, Mardred!

(bass booming) (time card is blank; Zelda fades out)
Zelda: (muffled sighing and talking while in a background) A whole month gone and still no word.
Impa: (nose and lips are popping out) I'm certain... (hugs a random object) he's alright.
Link: (deep voice) (looks like toy soldier, then has steroids) Yeah! That ol' Ganon's no match for the King!
Zelda: (random Hotel Mario backgrounds) Link, go to Gamelon... (while bass booming, Zelda's body is zooming in, but the face is not)
Link: Great! (squashes fairy) I can't wait to bomb... (the fairies touches Link, then he explodes, and we hear the crows cawing and we see the time card, which is the word "REALITIES")

Zelda: (looks like a ghost, muffled) Wake up, Impa. We're going to Gamelon.
Impa: (looks like an artistic circle) All right, dear. I'll get the Tri-Force of Wisdom.
(As we ship moving, the oil fueler was there. Gwonam and Link zoomed away, and it explodes)

(We zoom out to see King Harkinian's head, then video ends)

text:
1:05 - I burst
I can somehow imagine how you made all those effects, but damn that must've taken more time than usual. Not all of them are witty cookie cutter and chroma key tricks - some show direct editing of frames. It's those videos that make me feel so excited, and I wish there was something more I could do than just the "likeit+fave+alreadysubbed".
